notes: Tactical fleet formations. Battle Group combat (deploy your whole idle warship fleet into a raid) now has real positioning, not just pooled damage. Assign each ship to 🛡️ Vanguard (tanks — absorbs nearly all incoming fire while it holds, but fights at a discount), ⚔️ Line (your main damage dealers, protected behind the Vanguard), or 🌌 Reserve (safest, weakest). Lose the Vanguard and the Line becomes exposed next — the formation collapses tier by tier as defenders fall, and a standing Vanguard also screens you personally, not just the fleet. Move ships between tiers mid-fight from the raid card, which now shows each tier's ships, hull, and which one is currently taking fire. Formation choices are sticky across recall and redeploy.
